commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=2fdf3f46f597b0ec044e6e31b22fa6e84082f298)
commands.review_summary:
Updates package-manager detection and update-status dependency checks so `npm-shrinkwrap.json` can identify npm package installs and serve as the npm dependency lock marker.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +74. Total +84 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source and shipped-package artifact inspection show that this PR's detector condition is false for the reported npm package shape, so the code falls back to `packageManager: pnpm`.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This external PR needs a contributor or maintainer branch update plus real behavior proof; automation cannot supply the contributor's real install proof, and the live PR reports maintainer edits disabled.

target.title: fix(infra): recognize npm shrinkwrap in update status
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #87732.

- Treat published npm package roots with `npm-shrinkwrap.json` as npm installs even when their bundled `package.json` declares the repo's pnpm dev package manager.
- Carry `npm-shrinkwrap.json` through `checkDepsStatus` / `checkUpdateStatus` so npm status uses the shrinkwrap lock marker instead of falling through to missing `package-lock.json`.
- Preserve pnpm source checkout detection when pnpm workspace/source markers are present, avoiding the broader lockfile-precedence compatibility risk called out on #88666.

## Relationship to #88666

This is an alternate/completing fix for #88666. That PR fixes the detector layer, but ClawSweeper noted the status/update path still expected `package-lock.json` after detecting npm. This PR covers the full status surface and adds the requested `checkUpdateStatus` regression.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/detect-package-manager.test.ts src/infra/update-check.test.ts src/commands/status.update.test.ts src/commands/status-json-payload.test.ts`

Synthetic package-root proof, using a temp fixture with `package.json` declaring `pnpm@11.2.2`, `npm-shrinkwrap.json`, `node_modules`, and no `pnpm-lock.yaml` / `package-lock.json`:

```json
{
  "installKind": "package",
  "packageManager": "npm",
  "deps": {
    "manager": "npm",
    "status": "ok",
    "lockfile": "npm-shrinkwrap.json"
  }
}
```

Not tested: live global npm install on reporter hardware. The fix is covered with deterministic filesystem fixtures for detector and full update status behavior.
target.author: vortexopenclaw
